name: Global Restricted & Prohibited Goods
description: Platform baseline for prohibited goods, dual-use/export controls, and licensing/certification obligations.

rules.name: CITES-listed wildlife / ivory
rules.description: Wildlife products and ivory (HS 0507) are prohibited for trade.

effect.message: CITES-listed wildlife or ivory product is prohibited

rules.name: Narcotic substances
rules.description: Controlled narcotic substances are prohibited for commercial trade.

effect.message: Narcotic substances are prohibited for trade

rules.name: Dual-use export to embargoed destination
rules.description: Dual-use goods may not be exported to comprehensively embargoed destinations.

effect.message: Dual-use export to an embargoed destination is prohibited

rules.name: Defense / military goods
rules.description: Defense and military goods require an export-control license and manual review.

effect.message: Defense / military goods require export-control review

rules.name: Controlled chemicals
rules.description: Controlled chemicals require a permit and manual review before clearance.

rules.name: Pharmaceutical import
rules.description: Pharmaceutical / drug imports require a drug-import license and review.

rules.name: Hazardous materials
rules.description: Hazardous materials require a dangerous-goods declaration and review.

effect.message: Hazardous materials require a dangerous-goods declaration

rules.name: Food / agricultural import
rules.description: Food and agricultural imports require a phytosanitary / health certificate.
